case_title: RUSSELL BERRY VS. INTERCANE HOYU CO. LTD

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-02-2022 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST RUSSELL BERRY FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-04-2022, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-19-2022. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-04-2022 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JAN-10-2023 AT 10:30 AM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68608(B). THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: S. LE; PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (610)

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-11-2023 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-04-2022 Continued To Jan-10-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to January 10, 2023 at 10:30am in Department 610. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: G.Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2022 Continued To Oct-04-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to October 4, 2022 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.
